title: Fix a TypeScript type error so tsc is clean
task: `npm test` runs the TypeScript compiler on this project and currently fails with a type error in src/stats.ts. Fix the incorrect type annotation — the runtime logic is already correct, so do not change what the code computes (the formatted `toFixed(2)` output must stay). Run `npm test` to confirm tsc compiles cleanly.
notes: npm test shells out to a version-pinned tsc via `npx --yes --package typescript@5.7.3` so the fixture declares no dependencies; npx caches the package after the first run.
